hero.title: Working with
hero.subtitle: Your technical partner on the deals that matter most
hero.description: Solutions Architects are the technical backbone of Shopify’s Enterprise and Large account motion — globally. We work alongside SEs, AEs, and merchants to architect solutions for the most complex deals, remove technical blockers, and turn ambiguity into a clear path forward. We also serve as Revenue’s bridge to Product — feeding real merchant needs back into the platform — and bring subject matter expertise to conferences, executive dinners, and anywhere a technical voice moves the needle.

valuePillars.title: Subject Matter Experts
valuePillars.description: Deep technical insight aligned to subject matter expertise to assist solutioning efforts across the deal lifecycle.

valuePillars.title: Strategic Engagement
valuePillars.description: Deal strategy and relationship alignment with key technical stakeholders at the enterprise level.

valuePillars.title: Best Practices
valuePillars.description: Curating brand and internally facing technical assets that highlight best practices and up-skill audiences.

valuePillars.title: Product Bridge
valuePillars.description: Fostering strong relationships with internal teams to provide product direction influencing perspectives.

disciplines.name: Storefronts
disciplines.description: Liquid, Headless, Hydrogen, dev workflows, web performance, multi-storefront

disciplines.name: Checkout & Extensibility
disciplines.description: Checkout extensibility & customization, functions, custom data

disciplines.name: Payments
disciplines.description: SPCC, PLCC, payment provider platform, subscriptions, bundles, discount structures

disciplines.name: Security & Infrastructure
disciplines.description: Enterprise security, scale and resiliency, edge networks

disciplines.name: AI
disciplines.description: Agentic commerce, AI-native storefronts, Sidekick, Shop AI, MCP servers, AI integration patterns

triggers.title: Complexity
triggers.description: Shopify is one piece of a much larger enterprise architecture puzzle the brand needs help demystifying.

triggers.title: Technical
triggers.description: SE requires more subject matter expertise to adequately address brand concerns.

triggers.title: Alignment
triggers.description: Account team needs enhanced alignment with certain brand stakeholders.

engagementPaths.title: Ask-an-Architect Channel
engagementPaths.description: One-off solutioning questions that any member of the team could address. Preferred for segments outside Enterprise and Large Accounts.
steps: Include context — account name, use case, timeline
An available SA will respond within one business day

engagementPaths.title: Salesforce Case Request
engagementPaths.description: For dedicated assistance on an active sales engagement. A primary SA will be assigned to the opportunity.
steps: SE submits a New Case in Salesforce
Include problem statements and expected commitments
An SA is assigned and reaches out to align on approach
videoSteps: Fill out the request details and hit Next

dos: Engage early in the process — during Envision or Solution phases, not at the last minute.
Provide as much detail as possible on the problem statements and expected commitments in the case request.
Keep the SA in the loop throughout the engagement with a regular sync/async cadence.
Include relevant context upfront — architecture docs, stakeholder map, technical requirements.
donts: Have the AE submit the SA request — it should come from the SE who understands the technical context.
Use the SA as a supplementary or replacement SE — SAs bring depth, not breadth.
Make promises for proof of concepts to the merchant before aligning with the SA team on scope and feasibility.
Engage an SA at the proposal stage when the deal needs strategic shaping, not just validation.

examples.title: Pre-Workshop Architecture Review
examples.description: Prior to an on-site workshop, the SE and AE engaged the SA to review provided architectural documentation and develop guidelines for integration and re-architecture details.

examples.title: Headless Customer Experience POC
examples.description: Merchant wanted to drive customer experience online and in-store. SE engaged the SA to discuss headless workflows and help build a POC to demonstrate feasibility.

examples.title: POS + OMS to ERP Integration
examples.description: Merchant moving POS and OMS to Shopify needed to understand ERP integration for Shipping and Cash & Carry orders. SE engaged SA for system workflow diagrams.

resources.title: Architecture Diagram Library
resources.description: Curated repository of reusable, use-case diagram templates. Includes reference architectures from partners like Algolia, Recharge, and Vertex.

resources.title: SA Call Coaches
resources.description: LibreChat agents trained to provide technical feedback on merchant call transcripts and pre-call discovery recommendations.

resources.title: Solutions Architect Hub
resources.description: Seismic repository featuring SA-led enablement sessions and reusable content like POV pitches and solution guides.

career.role: Head of Enterprise Solution Architecture, NA
